headline: Williams Companies Expands Funding Options With New Credit Lines And Equity Shelf
summary: Williams Companies (NYSE:WMB) has entered into new credit agreements, expanding its access to debt financing. The company has also filed a large shelf registration statement, allowing for potential future equity issuance. These steps reflect changes in financing options that could be used to support future initiatives or corporate actions. Williams Companies comes into this financing move with NYSE:WMB trading at $70.04 and showing strong multi year share performance, including a very large...
